levels.title: Triangle
levels.func:
n = 3
step = floor(t * n)
bx = cos(step * 6.28318 / n)
by = sin(step * 6.28318 / n)
cx = cos((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
cy = sin((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
x = lerp(bx, cx, (t * n) - step)
y = lerp(by, cy, (t * n) - step)

levels.title: Square
levels.func:
n = 4
step = floor(t * n)
bx = cos(step * 6.28318 / n)
by = sin(step * 6.28318 / n)
cx = cos((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
cy = sin((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
x = lerp(bx, cx, (t * n) - step)
y = lerp(by, cy, (t * n) - step)

levels.title: Pentagon
levels.func:
n = 5
step = floor(t * n)
bx = cos(step * 6.28318 / n)
by = sin(step * 6.28318 / n)
cx = cos((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
cy = sin((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
x = lerp(bx, cx, (t * n) - step)
y = lerp(by, cy, (t * n) - step)

levels.title: Hexagon
levels.func:
n = 6
step = floor(t * n)
bx = cos(step * 6.28318 / n)
by = sin(step * 6.28318 / n)
cx = cos((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
cy = sin((step + 1) * 6.28318 / n)
x = lerp(bx, cx, (t * n) - step)
y = lerp(by, cy, (t * n) - step)

levels.title: Pentagram
levels.func:
n = 5
step = floor(t * n)
bx = cos(step * 6.28318 / n)
by = sin(step * 6.28318 / n)
cx = cos((step + 2) * 6.28318 / n)
cy = sin((step + 2) * 6.28318 / n)
x = lerp(bx, cx, (t * n) - step)
y = lerp(by, cy, (t * n) - step)
